evals.name: simple-health-check
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is a simple 3-task list, recommend single agent (no team), identify that tasks are mostly sequential, and not over-plan a simple feature

evals.name: medium-dashboard
evals.expected_output: Should identify parallelism (DB schema + API can happen parallel to frontend), recommend team execution, assign appropriate agents (database-schema-specialist, express-api-developer, frontend-developer, qa-engineer), organize into 3-4 waves

evals.name: complex-sso-auth
evals.expected_output: Should flag 13 tasks as too many for one phase, recommend splitting into 2 phases, identify security-auditor for security tasks, recommend deferring deployment (task 13), organize remaining into waves with proper dependencies
